response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong software engineering experience with demonstrated skills in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and full-stack development, but the resume shows minimal C++ experience (only a brief 6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015) and no SQL Server/Oracle experience or capital markets/fixed income domain knowledge. The mandatory requirements of 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows and financial-services domain expertise are not met.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with 15+ years of diverse experience
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development
Some C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on a developer tooling product
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience, far below the 5-10 year requirement
No SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (only MongoDB, MySQL, generic SQL)
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No fixed income or capital markets domain background
